ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wind_turbines" (
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind turbine */,
  "turbine_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind turbine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the wind turbine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the wind turbine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the turbine was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the turbine */,
  "wind_farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm where the turbine is located */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each turbine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turbine model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_turbines_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES turbine_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_turbines_wind_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("wind_farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_farms" (
  "wind_farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind farm */,
  "wind_farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the wind farm */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Total capacity of the wind farm in MW */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the wind farm */,
  "owner_company" TEXT /* Name of the company owning the wind farm */,
  "operational_since" TEXT /* Date the wind farm started operations */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  "number_of_turbines" INTEGER /* Total number of turbines in the wind farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind turbine */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "power_kw" REAL /* Power output in kilowatts */,
  "cp" REAL /* Power coefficient (Cp) */,
  "thrust_kn" REAL /* Thrust in kilonewtons */,
  "ct" REAL /* Thrust coefficient (Ct) */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature at the turbine during the performance measurement */,
  "humidity_percent" REAL /* Humidity at the turbine during the performance measurement */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the turbine during the performance measurement */,
  "wind_direction_degrees" REAL /* Wind direction at the turbine during the performance measurement */,
  "vibration_level" REAL /* Vibration level of the turbine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES wind_turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind turbine */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance log entry */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part used in maintenance */,
  "maintenance_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the maintenance (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES wind_turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the technician */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "wind_farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind farm */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data entry */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity_percent" REAL /* Humidity in percent */,
  "wind_direction_degrees" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "solar_radiation_wpm2" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover_percent" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "wind_gust_mps" REAL /* Maximum wind gust speed in meters per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wind_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("wind_farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "accessed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind turbine the report is about */,
  "wind_farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind farm the report is about */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES wind_turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_wind_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("wind_farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm log entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind turbine */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., over-speed, over-temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alarm was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alarm (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken to resolve the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES wind_turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turbine_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turbine model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the turbine model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the turbine model */,
  "capacity_kw" REAL /* Capacity of the turbine in kilowatts */,
  "max_wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Maximum wind speed the turbine can handle in meters per second */,
  "min_wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Minimum wind speed required for the turbine to generate power in meters per second */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the turbine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the turbine model */,
  "blade_length_m" REAL /* Length of the turbine blades in meters */,
  "rotor_diameter_m" REAL /* Diameter of the rotor in meters */,
  "cut_in_wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Minimum wind speed required for the turbine to start generating power */,
  "cut_out_wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Maximum wind speed at which the turbine will shut down for safety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind turbine */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., anemometer, temperature, humidity) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor data entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value measured by the sensor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measured value */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the turbine (e.g., nacelle, hub, blade) */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor measurements */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sensor calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES wind_turbines ("turbine_id")
)
